🐈 ccgotchi

A Tamagotchi for your Claude Code statusline.
✓ Installed.
The statusline is wired into Claude Code. Open a new session (or wait a second) to see your usage bars and pet.
Configure
Use the menu-bar icon: pick a pet, toggle ✨ shiny, change bar style / colors / language — changes apply live.
Pet health
Your pet's mood = how much quota you have left. Burn through your 5h / weekly / context budget and it gets sick; it recovers as limits reset.
github.com/yunyang906/ccgotchi · MIT
